name: comfyui-agents
description: Bridge an external coding agent (Codex) to a running ComfyUI graph: exchange text and images on named channels and trigger workflow runs over MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Exchange text/images with a running ComfyUI graph and trigger runs over MCP
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the ComfyUI-Nodes-Agents in-process MCP server (HTTP, 127.0.0.1:9188/mcp). Pull images/text the graph emitted, push text/images back into the graph, list channels, and run saved workflows from the agent.
defaultPrompt: Pull the latest image from the ComfyUI graph and describe it.
Push a prompt to ComfyUI and run the txt2img workflow.
